title: Pearson: Notice of monetary penalty and costs recovery (A level Chinese)
body: "On 1 December 2025 Ofqual accepted a settlement proposal from Pearson following findings that it had failed to comply with its Conditions of Recognition in relation to the setting and marking of assessments for its GCE A level qualification in Chinese.  Pearson agreed to pay a fine of £505,000, together with £20,000 in respect of Ofqual’s investigation and legal costs. Final decisions were made by Ofqual’s Enforcement Panel on 5 December 2025. "

taxons.title: Key stage 5 exam marking, qualifications and results
